sections.paragraph:
καταπιστεύω trust (s. πιστεύω; Polyb.; Plut., Lys. 8, 3; pap; Mi 7:5) w. dat. (Polyb. 2, 3, 3 al.) ἑαυτῷ trust oneself Hm 9:10.

Polyb Polyb , III–II b.c.—List 5

Plut Plut , I–II a.d.—List 5

pap pap = papyrus, -yri

dat. dat. = dative

  1. al. =alibi (elsewhere), aliter (otherwise), alii (others)

Hm Hm = Mandates

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 524
